# tenableio_exclusion (Resource)

Manages a scan exclusion in Tenable.io.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `members` (String) Comma-separated list of targets to exclude (IPs, hostnames, CIDR ranges).
- `name` (String) The name of the exclusion.

### Optional

- `description` (String) The description of the exclusion.
- `network_id` (String) The UUID of the network the exclusion applies to.
- `schedule` (Attributes) Schedule for when the exclusion is active. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--schedule))

### Read-Only

- `creation_date` (Number) Unix timestamp when the exclusion was created.
- `id` (Number) The unique identifier for the exclusion.
- `last_modification_date` (Number) Unix timestamp when the exclusion was last modified.

<a id="nestedatt--schedule"></a>
### Nested Schema for `schedule`

Required:

- `enabled` (Boolean) Whether the schedule is enabled.

Optional:

- `endtime` (String) End time (format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS).
- `rrules` (String) Recurrence rules (iCal RRULE format).
- `starttime` (String) Start time (format: YYYY-MM-DD HH:MM:SS).
- `timezone` (String) Timezone for the schedule.
